node.statement: E2 (left, h_{a,a}-term). The product hole h_{a,a}=a∘a-P(a∘a)=a^2-P(a^2) in Ker P (def square-hole). Apply GT-onehole-51 (eq 5.1: ||P((h_{r,s}∘t)∘u)||<=C sqrt(eta)||r||||s||||t||||u||) with r=s=a, t=b, u=a, so h_{r,s}=h_{a,a}: ||P((h_{a,a}∘b)∘a)||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||·||a||·||b||·||a||=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. CONCLUSION: ||P((h_{a,a}∘b)∘a)||<=C sqrt(eta)||a||^3||b||. Uses GT-onehole-51, def square-hole.
